title: Automation Run Failed Event Payload
description: Payload schema for an event that is emitted when an automation run has failed

runId.description: Unique identifier for the automation run.

resource.description: The resource that the automation run is associated with.

id.description: The unique identifier of the resource.

name.description: The human-readable name of the resource.

status.description: The final status of the automation run. Always 'failed' for this event.

startTime.description: The timestamp when the automation run started (ISO 8601 format).

endTime.description: The timestamp when the automation run completed (ISO 8601 format).

warnings.description: Optional list of warnings that were generated during the automation run. These are non-critical issues that did not cause the run to fail but may require attention.

errors.description: A required list of errors that were generated during the automation run that contributed to the failure.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this event, such as diagnostics, exit codes, or API error details.
